title: agrostemma brachylobum
intro: Agrostemma brachylobum, also known as dwarf corn-cockle, is a perennial plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate menstrual cramps, and act as a diuretic, making it a useful remedy for urinary issues. Agrostemma brachylobum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
